ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bim_objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each BIM object */,
  "global_id" TEXT /* Globally unique identifier for the object */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the object */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the object */,
  "owner_history_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner history record */,
  "object_type" TEXT /* Type of the BIM object (e.g., Building, Bridge) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the object was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  "version" TEXT /* Current version of the BIM object */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the object (e.g., Draft, Approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bim_objects_owner_history_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_history_id") REFERENCES owner_history ("owner_history_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owner_history" (
  "owner_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner history record */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the BIM object */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Current owner of the object */,
  "application" TEXT /* Application used to modify the object */,
  "local_id" TEXT /* Local identification of the object */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the last modification */,
  "previous_owner" TEXT /* Previous owner of the object */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., Modification, Deletion) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the change */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user who made the change (e.g., Architect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_owner_history_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES bim_objects ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attributes" (
  "attribute_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attribute record */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the BIM object */,
  "attribute_name" TEXT /* Name of the attribute (e.g., IfcRoot, GlobalId) */,
  "attribute_value" TEXT /* Value of the attribute */,
  "attribute_type" TEXT /* Type of the attribute (e.g., IfcRoot, IfcGloballyUniqueId) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the attribute value */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the attribute is mandatory */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the attribute if not specified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attribute_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attributes_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES bim_objects ("object_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each BIM object

Name of the object
